priority_basis: R-036 explicitly handed off integration of the default-ignorable exclusion into the authenticated XID admission pipeline; this was the highest-priority non-duplicative frontier gap visible in recent commits.
finding: Default-ignorable exclusion must remain an independent authenticated admission predicate and run before registry mutation, even for XID-valid continuation characters.

verification.strongest_feasible_route: Exact committed source and dependency inspection through the GitHub connector.
verification.blocker: The isolated execution container could not resolve github.com and no CI dispatch/run path was available.
verification.required_next_verification: Run node --check and node --test tools/frontier-research/unicode-identifier-syntax.test.mjs in a fresh checkout or CI.

handoff: After executable verification, run the integrated gate against the full authenticated Unicode 17.0.0 bundle. Then implement script-restriction classification as a separate predicate rather than extending default-ignorable logic.
shared_state_policy: Additive owned queue-update record only; canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
